Terms of Use
BodyCipher — Please read and accept before continuing
What is BodyCipher?

The human body is constantly communicating. Changes in the tongue, nails, eyes, skin, and energy levels are recognized in traditional holistic practice as observable signals associated with specific organ systems and nutritional needs. Most people never learn to read them.

BodyCipher is a wellness education tool that bridges that gap. You can upload or take a photo of a body area — tongue, nails, eyes, skin — type in your symptoms or walk through a guided symptom assessment describing how you've been feeling. The app observes the visual and reported signs you provide and identifies which body systems they have historically been associated with in traditional holistic practice.

From there, it suggests a personalized selection of herbs and plants from a library of over 107 botanicals — each with centuries of traditional use behind them — that have historically been used to support those specific body systems.

Every suggestion is then screened against your personal health profile. If you're taking medications, managing a condition, or pregnant, the app flags any herbs that may warrant extra caution — helping you make more informed conversations with your healthcare provider.

This is not a medical tool. It is a wellness and education companion rooted in traditional plant medicine — designed to help you become a more informed, empowered participant in your own health journey.

⚠ Important — Read Carefully
BodyCipher is a general educational reference tool only. It does not provide medical advice, diagnoses, or treatment recommendations. All content is for informational and educational purposes only.
1. Not Medical Advice

BodyCipher and all information, herb references, nutritional guidance, and lifestyle suggestions provided through this application are for general educational and informational purposes only. Nothing in this application constitutes, or should be construed as, medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or a substitute for professional medical consultation. The content is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition.

2. FDA Disclaimer

These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA). The herbal and nutritional information in this application is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Dietary supplements and herbs are not regulated as drugs by the FDA. Always consult a licensed healthcare provider before using any herb, supplement, or natural remedy.

3. Consult a Healthcare Professional

Always seek the advice of your physician, naturopathic doctor, or other qualified health provider before beginning any new health regimen, herb, supplement, or dietary change — especially if you have a pre-existing medical condition, are pregnant, nursing, or taking prescription medications. Never delay, disregard, or discontinue professional medical advice because of something you read in this application.

4. Herb-Drug Interactions

Many herbal remedies can interact with prescription and over-the-counter medications. Some herbs can affect blood clotting, blood pressure, blood sugar, liver enzymes, or the metabolism of pharmaceutical drugs. It is your responsibility to disclose any herbs or supplements to your healthcare provider and to verify safety with a pharmacist or licensed practitioner before use.

5. Observational Nature of Results

The inquiry results generated by BodyCipher are based on patterns described by the user and general traditional herbal knowledge. Results are observational and educational in nature — they do not constitute a clinical assessment, medical diagnosis, or professional health evaluation. Individual results may vary. The app cannot account for your individual health history, medications, allergies, or specific circumstances.

6. Emergency Situations

If you are experiencing a medical emergency, chest pain, difficulty breathing, signs of stroke, severe bleeding, or any life-threatening symptoms — call 911 or your local emergency services immediately. Do not use this application as a substitute for emergency care.

7. User Responsibility

By using BodyCipher, you acknowledge that you are solely responsible for any decisions you make regarding your health based on information obtained from this application. The developers, publishers, and contributors of BodyCipher assume no liability for any harm, injury, loss, or damage arising from your use of this application or reliance on its content.

8. No Doctor-Patient Relationship

Use of BodyCipher does not create a doctor-patient relationship, a practitioner-client relationship, or any other professional health relationship between you and the creators or operators of this application.

9. Accuracy of Information

While we strive to provide accurate traditional herbal knowledge, no warranty is made regarding the completeness, accuracy, or currency of any information. Traditional herbal uses are based on historical practices and may not be supported by modern clinical research. Individual responses to herbs vary widely.

10. Changes to Terms

These terms may be updated periodically. Continued use of the application constitutes acceptance of any revised terms.

Last updated: 2025. BodyCipher is a Beta educational reference application.
⚠ Educational Reference Only — Not medical advice. Not a diagnosis. Consult a licensed healthcare provider. Emergency? Call 911.

BodyCipher Inquiry
Complete any or all sections below — results are for educational reference only
1
Take or Upload a Photo (optional)
Eyes, tongue, face, nails, skin — visual patterns may suggest areas of interest
📷
Take a Photo
Opens your camera directly · iPhone & Android
or choose existing photo
🖼️
Choose from Photos / Files
Upload from any device · or drag & drop here
📷 Select what the photo shows
Select the area so the app applies the relevant inquiry lens
2
Describe Your Condition
Type any illness, condition, or symptom in your own words
3
Symptom Checklist
Tap every symptom you currently observe — select as many as needed
4
Self-Inquiry Guide
What to look for before you submit
👁 Eyes
Sclera color (white, yellow, red lines), iris rings, puffiness or darkness under eye
👅 Tongue
Coating color & thickness, cracks, edges (scalloped), tip color, tongue body color
🌿 Skin & Face
Overall tone, zone breakouts (forehead, cheeks, chin, nose), rashes, oiliness, dryness
💅 Nails
Color of nail beds, white spots, ridges (horizontal or vertical), brittleness, shape
👄 Lips & Mouth
Lip color, cracked corners, white patches, gum health, breath quality
⚡ How You Feel
Energy levels, sleep quality, digestion, pain locations, mood, mental clarity
💡 Tip: The more detail you provide across all sections — photo, description, and checklist — the more specific and relevant your inquiry results will be.
